title: Evomut
description: An RPG mod that adds different statues for the player, mobs, weapons and tools. New biomes and classes
body:
An RPG mod that adds different statues for the player, mobs, weapons and tools. New biomes and classes
### Statue Evomut-"Skills"
![Class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9497cc6caf99bf11520abcdcde532004f4e47d2.png)

This statue adds 5 constellations for leveling: _**Combat, Mining, Life, Speed, Global**_

But pumping requires not only prints, but also other attributes: **_Combat, Poesia, Mining, Life and Protection_**

### Statue Creeper-"Race"
![Race](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995f54390bed07909f078e4b7d1620dcf2472c22.jpeg)
Each Race has its own abilities and disadvantages, so you need to choose wisely
Each race has a boost, and with each level you will gain new abilities

### Statue Class-"Class"
![Class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f718b9d1e1c20dc6a780e41fbddf640d49fe115f.jpeg)
Each class has its own peculiarities

This statue has its own Points

Warrior- specializes in close combat
His main attribute - _Strength_

Wizard- specializes in magic power
His main attribute - _Mana_

Shooter- specializes in long-range combat 
The main attribute - _Energy_

Healer- specializes in healing
The main attribute - _Light_
